stemHtml: A pilot has just finished reviewing the meteorological information for a flight within central Europe.This his/her last flight for the month of July. He/she noticed that the destination weather report warns of tornadoes in the area. This is:

options.a: Possible, as tornadoes, including violent ones, are common in Europe.
options.b: NOT possible, as tornadoes only occur in North America.
options.c: NOT possible, as tornadoes do NOT occur during the summer in Europe.
options.d: Possible, as tornadoes can occur in Europe throughout the year.
